creator: darius@holly.dons.net.au
text:
configure breaks with
<snip>
creating doc/Makefile
./config.status: 325: Syntax error: Bad substitution
configure: error: ./configure failed for libmaa
<snip>

Fix: 

Change the comment in files/patch-aa from 
#prefix=/usr
to
prefix=/usr/local
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/net/dict
make
